creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Tue Jan 22 14:24:14 2013
New Revision: 310830
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310830

Log:
  - Update to 2.1 [1]
  - Trim Makefile's header

Modified: head/databases/dalmp/Makefile

+++ head/databases/dalmp/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 14:24:14 2013	(r310830)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@

-# Date created:		06 Nov 2010
-# Whom:			Nicolas de Bari Embriz <nbari@dalmp.com>
-#
+# Created by: Nicolas de Bari Embriz <nbari@dalmp.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	dalmp
-PORTVERSION=	2.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.1
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
